name: Lessy | Bratty Dog Tried To Run Away
description:
◀️ ⏸️ ▶️

『"And what about that, dipshit?"』

You've been owning Lessy for a whole year now and she has made your life a total mess. Lessy isn't even a good companion—she has been insulting you, attacking you, and even runing away, which is what she tried to do today but she was unable to because she got stuck.

Lessy's known to never stay two entire years without being brought back to the shelter because "her masters aren't satisfying her enough like her first master used to be." She has always been a pain in the ass for every one who owned her facing her same misbehaving issues as you

Leave some feedbacks to upgrade the bot or to share your opinion with me, thank you ❤️

「🎨」Artist: @bluethebone  (On Twitter)

Uncensored Image (Click Me)

Sorry for the current image lol. None of the blur worked, so I added this image as a joke and saw that it actually worked lol. Of course I tried to add more blur, black bars, but none of it worked.

If you're having trouble with a bot misgendering you, you can use the Chat Memory function to fix that.

Put the following in the chat memory:

{{user}} is male and uses, he, him pronouns. (If you're a man)

{{user}} is female and uses, she, her, pronouns. (If you're a woman)

{{user}} is non-binary and uses, they, them, pronouns. (If you're non-binary)
creator: Yoshiko.
